SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.utils

Class JkUtilsIO

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.utils.JkUtilsIO
public final class JkUtilsIO extends Object
Utility class for dealing with Inputs/Outputs.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    JkUtilsIO.JkStreamGobbler
    Runs a thread copying all data from the specified input stream to specified output streams.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> T
    cloneBySerialization(Object objectToClone, ClassLoader targetClassLoader)
    Serializes an object to the current classloader and deserializes it in the specified classloader.

    Closes the specified closeable object, ignoring any exceptions.

    Closes the specified closeable object, ignoring any exceptions.

    Closes the specified closeable object, ignoring any exceptions.
    static void
    closeQuietly(ZipFile... zipFiles)
    Same as ZipFile.close() but throwing only unchecked exceptions.
    static void
    copy(InputStream in, OutputStream out)
    Copies the content of the given input getOutputStream to a specified output getOutputStream.

    deserialize(InputStream inputStream)
    Deserializes the content of the specified input getOutputStream to a Java object.

    deserialize(InputStream inputStream, ClassLoader classLoader)
    Deserializes the content of a given input file to a Java object loaded in the specified classloader.

    deserialize(Path file)
    Deserializes the content of the specified file to a Java object.

      Creates a no-op print getOutputStream.

      Closes the specified closeable object, ignoring any exceptions.

    • inputStream

      public static FileInputStream inputStream(File file)
      Same as FileInputStream constructor but throwing unchecked exceptions.

      public static FileOutputStream outputStream(File file, boolean append)
      Same as FileOutputStream constructor but throwing unchecked exceptions.

    • inputStream

      public static InputStream inputStream(URL file)
      Same as URL.openStream() but throwing only unchecked exceptions.

    • read

      public static int read(InputStream inputStream)
      Equivalent to InputStream.read() but throwing only unchecked exceptions.

    • readAsLines

      public static List<String> readAsLines(InputStream in)
      Returns the content of the specified input getOutputStream, line by line.

    • read

      public static String read(URL url)
      Returns the content of the given url as a string.

    • readAsString

      public static String readAsString(InputStream in)
      Returns the content of the given input getOutputStream as a single string.

    • closeQuietly

      public static void closeQuietly(ZipFile... zipFiles)
      Same as ZipFile.close() but throwing only unchecked exceptions.

    • copyUrlContentToCacheFile

      public static Path copyUrlContentToCacheFile(URL url, PrintStream report, Path cacheDir)
      Copies the content of an url in a cache file. The cached file path will be [jeka user dir]/cache/url-contents/[last segment of the url (after last '/')]. If the file already exist than the content of the url is not copied and the file is directly returned.

    • copyUrlToFile

      public static void copyUrlToFile(URL url, Path file)
      Copies the content of the given url to the specified file.

    • copyUrlToFile

      public static void copyUrlToFile(String url, Path file)

    • copy

      public static void copy(InputStream in, OutputStream out)
      Copies the content of the given input getOutputStream to a specified output getOutputStream.

    • write

      public static void write(OutputStream outputStream, byte[] bytes)

    • flush

      public static void flush(OutputStream outputStream)

    • serialize

      public static void serialize(Object object, Path file)
      Serializes a given Java object to the specified file.

    • serialize

      public static void serialize(Object object, OutputStream outputStream)
      Serializes a given Java object to the specified output getOutputStream.

    • deserialize

      public static <T> T deserialize(Path file)
      Deserializes the content of the specified file to a Java object.

    • deserialize

      public static <T> T deserialize(InputStream inputStream)
      Deserializes the content of the specified input getOutputStream to a Java object.

    • deserialize

      public static <T> T deserialize(InputStream inputStream, ClassLoader classLoader)
      Deserializes the content of a given input file to a Java object loaded in the specified classloader.

    • cloneBySerialization

      public static <T> T cloneBySerialization(Object objectToClone, ClassLoader targetClassLoader)
      Serializes an object to the current classloader and deserializes it in the specified classloader.

    • newStreamGobbler

      public static JkUtilsIO.JkStreamGobbler newStreamGobbler(Process process, InputStream is, OutputStream... outputStreams)
      Returns a thread that write each data read to the specified inputStream to the specified output getOutputStream.
